code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(content)
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut idx = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(content, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      let line = string.substring(content, start, i)
      print("[#{idx}] #{line}")
      idx = idx + 1
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let line = string.substring(content, start, n)
  print("[#{idx}] #{line}")
end
